urdu transliteration text: Dua Karo Ke Koi Mojiza Dikhae Hussain
english translation text: Pray that Hussain shows us a miracle

urdu transliteration text: Phir Ek Baar Hume Karbala Bulaae Hussain
english translation text: May we get called to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text: Naseeb Jald Mujhe Shah Ki Ziyarat Ho
english translation text: May I be granted the Ziyarat of Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe Bhi Kaash Kisi Shab Me Ye
Basharat Ho
english translation text: May I get this inspiration one evening

urdu transliteration text:
Let’s go, Hussain has come to collect you himself today
Chalo Utho Ke Tumhe Aaj Lene Aaye Hussain
Woh Jiska Khana E Kaba Tawaaf Karta Hai
Woh Jiski Jaaliyan Jibreel Saaf Karta Hai
english translation text: That whose Zareeh is cleaned by Jibraeel

urdu transliteration text: Wahaan Ka Mujhko Bhi Jaarob Kash Banaye Hussain
english translation text: May Hussain grant me the honour of cleaning his shrine

urdu transliteration text: Hatega Jaise Hi Aankhon Se Ashk Ka Parda
english translation text: As soon as the flood of tears is removed from my eyes

urdu transliteration text:
If Hussain awakens my destiny
Mera Naseeb Jo Ek Baar Phir Jagaa E Hussain
Who Jisko Baantna Chahe Woh Baant De Jannat
english translation text: Whoever he wants to grant Jannah, he can do ao

urdu transliteration text: Mera To Karbobala Me Hi Ghar Banaye Hussain
english translation text: I just want Hussain to make a house for me in Karbala
